title: Thaumon
description: Thaumcraft-inspired decoration blocks for modern Minecraft
body:
~ A Thaumon is a subatomic particle of magic ~
---

--- This mod was created on a whim after hearing the comments of a user in the CoFH Discord server lamenting the lack of Thaumcraft palette blocks in modern Minecraft. I joked that I would happily do it...in MCreator. Surprisingly, they were cool with that. **As of Thaumon 2+, this is no longer the case! No code or assets from MCreator are used.** --- **Thaumon** is a decoration mod inspired by the blocks and textures of Thaumcraft. It adds Greatwood, Silverwood, Arcane Stone, and Eldritch Stone building materials, as well as a few Amber blocks, and some tabletop decorative doodads. To get started, make some Mutagen by breaking down some amethyst in a stonecutter. Textures are all original *(often edits of vanilla textures because I'm not that great of an artist)* and unrelated to any Thaumcraft assets in everything except name. When Thaumcraft 7 releases, this mod will likely transform into something different. It might become an addon to Thaumcraft, or it might change entirely! ---
Message regarding Thaumon 1.0.x This mod's 1.0 versions were created using *MCreator*. If that bothers you, it probably should! That's okay though - there are no functional objects in those versions besides doors and such, everything is simply a decorative block. There should be no issues arising from MCreator's dubious generated code. If it still bothers you, just update the mod! You should do that anyway, we're adding more stuff.
---
